zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm於大約1523年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，她的父親James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie26歲，母親Anna Sinclair43歲。她於1578年4月12日與Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm于大约1523年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾时，她的父亲James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie26岁，母亲Anna Sinclair43岁。她于1578年4月12日与Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm在英国苏格兰洛包爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

en.lifeSummary: When Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm was born about 1523, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, her father, James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie, was 26 and her mother, Anna Sinclair, was 43. She married Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm on 12 April 1578, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm est née environ 1523, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Sinclair, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm le 12 avril 1578, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholmが約1523年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokieは26歳，母Anna Sinclairは43歳であった。1578年4月12日にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでThomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm(이)가 대략 1523년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Sinclair(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1578년 4월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm родилась около 1523 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Fraser of Foyness, of Culbokie было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Sinclair, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chisholm 15th of Chisholm 12 апреля 1578 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.
